---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for ShutUp Tabs
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
Describe the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you would like ShutUp Tabs to do.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Editor
Which editor(s) would this feature apply to?
- [ ] VS Code
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Google Antigravity
- [ ] Windsurf
- [ ] Other:

## Additional Context
Any other information, mockups, or examples that would help explain the feature request.
